subcodes.first_line: O Kamál! Thou hast hearkened unto the call of thy Lord when it was raised in truth, and thou hast drunk from the ocean of reunion when the Luminary shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کمال قد سمعت ندآء ربک اذ ارتفع بالحق و شربت من بحر الوصال اذ کان النیر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
